why_no_safe_local_only_lane_remains: The narrow pre-action separator has already been selected and locally verified: repair_or_pairing_improving micro-deficit context with 0 < pre_seed_opp_qty - pre_seed_same_qty <= 0.25 and pre_seed_open_qty <= 1.0.
The selected affected seeds already passed bounded replay_store_v2 source-truth readiness as research-only source truth.
The no-order runner already exposes default-off diagnostic markers and a fail-closed micro-deficit summary scorer.
Existing local manifests cannot answer whether fresh same-window no-order opportunity volume, queue context, and residual-tail concentration survive in the live runner window.

Any additional local-only mechanism from the same fields would be a threshold sweep around the chosen micro-deficit predicate or would reuse post-action source_pair/source_residual labels as live criteria.

local_candidate_lanes_rejected.reason: Would become an ungrounded cap/threshold sweep before same-window no-order evidence exists.
Runner implementation is default-off readiness only; no fresh no-order window has shown the marker volume/risk-budget signature.
Those fields are post-action labels for offline discovery, not live pre-action criteria.
Previously reduced to static cap/price/summary-only families or failed residual improvement.
Frozen mechanisms require new exact fields/run approval; reviving them here would violate the current kill list.

missing_fields_or_evidence: fresh no-order same-window micro-deficit marker count
same-window source-link transition parity for the exact run
residual-tail exemplar coverage for micro-deficit candidates in the exact run
normalized risk-budget quality in the exact run: sample, p90, residual shares, pair-tail loss share, fee/risk-adjusted proxy
queue/opportunity context sufficient to distinguish local history from live no-order behavior

research_ranking.interpretation: The local micro-deficit research chain is ready, but the next evidence must come from the exact diagnostic no-order shadow. This is not a strategy failure.

next_executable_action: Wait for explicit main-thread approval of late_repair90_micro_deficit_repair_guard_no_order_review. If approved, run bounded preflight and start exactly one diagnostic-only no-order shadow with micro-deficit guard disabled and marker/scorer enabled. If not approved, do not SSH and do not start shadow; choose only a genuinely new D+ research lane with new pre-action fields, otherwise keep UNKNOWN.
